binary_metadata.file_type: a sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.description:
Collection of multiple types of security lists
SecLists is a collection of multiple types of lists used during security
assessments. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data grep
strings, fuzzing payloads, and many more.
.
The goal is to enable a security tester to pull this repo onto a new testing
box and have access to every type of list that may be needed.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use seclists because ### seclists.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair seclists with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `seclists --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### seclists.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install seclists
Install with: sudo apt install seclists
